mapper.select: select count(*) from post where p_type = #{c} and p_status = 'Y'

select p.p_number, p.p_title, p.views, p.p_date, p.p_type, p.user_id, p.p_status, p.p_status, p.is_notice, p.create_date, u.user_name, count(l.p_number) as like_count from post p join users u on p.user_id = u.user_id left join p_like l on p.p_number = l.p_number where p.p_status = 'Y' and p.p_type = 'R' group by p.p_number, p.p_title, p.views, p.p_date, p.p_type, p.user_id, p.p_status, p.p_status, p.is_notice, p.create_date, u.user_name order by
p.views DESC p.views ASC p.p_date DESC
select * from post join users using(user_id) where p_number = #{id} and p_status = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
select seq_post.nextval from dual
insert into post values(#{rNumber}, #{rTitle}, #{rContents}, default, sysdate, #{pType}, #{userId}, 'Y')
mapper.select: select * from(select p.*, u.user_name, nvl(l.like_count, 0) as like_count from post p join users u on p.user_id = u.user_id left join ( select p_number, count(*) as like_count from p_like group by p_number ) l on p.p_number = l.p_number where p.p_type = 'R' and p.p_status = 'Y') where rownum < = 5
select * from reply join users using(user_id) where p_number = #{pNumber} and c_status = 'Y' order by c_number desc
mapper.insert: insert into reply values(seq_reply.nextval, #{comments}, default, #{pNumber}, #{userId}, default)
mapper.select: select count(*) from post p join users u on p.user_id = u.user_id where p.p_type = 'R' and ( p.p_title like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or u.user_name like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

select p.*, u.user_name from post p join users u on p.user_id = u.user_id where p.p_type = 'R' and ( p.p_title like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or u.user_name like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) order by
p.views DESC p.views ASC p.p_date DESC
mapper.delete: delete from p_like where user_id = #{userId} and p_number = #{pNumber}
